name: Medaea EHR — Local Dev

values.description: FastAPI backend base URL. Change to your deployed URL for staging/production.
JWT Bearer token. Auto-populated by Login and MFA Verify requests.
Last created or listed patient UUID. Auto-populated by List Patients / Create Patient.
Last created appointment UUID. Auto-populated by Create Appointment.
Last created encounter UUID. Auto-populated by Create Encounter.
Token from verification email. Paste from email link query param.
Token from password reset email. Paste from email link query param.
PTO request UUID for status update.

description:
## Medaea EHR — Local Development Environment

Base URL: http://localhost:8000

### Quick Setup
1. Import this environment into Postman
2. Import `Medaea_EHR_API.postman_collection.json`
3. Run **System > Health Check** to confirm the server is running
4. Run **Authentication > Signup** or **Login** to get a JWT token
5. All other requests will use `{{access_token}}` automatically

### Environments
| Environment | base_url |
|---|---|
| Local Dev | http://localhost:8000 |
| Docker | http://localhost:8000 |
| Staging | https://api-staging.medaea.ai |
| Production | https://api.medaea.ai |
